things.name: Santa Cruz Fort & Chapel
things.description: Spanish fortress on Murdjadjo Mountain overlooking the city and bay

things.name: Bey's Palace (Regency Palace)
things.description: 18th-century Ottoman-Andalusian palace with the best example of Moorish tilework in Algeria

things.name: City Hall (Mairie d'Oran)
things.description: Magnificent French colonial town hall from 1886

things.name: Musee National Ahmed Zabana
things.description: Oran's main museum with prehistoric rock art and colonial history

things.name: Place du 1er Novembre (Place Joffre)
things.description: Grand French colonial square with the Palais des Rais and Oran Cathedral

things.name: Port of Oran
things.description: Historic Mediterranean port that inspired Albert Camus's novel The Plague

things.name: Oran Cathedral (Sacred Heart)
things.description: Neoclassical French colonial cathedral - now a public library

things.name: Tlemcen Day Trip
things.description: The pearl of the Maghreb - UNESCO-listed medina with Almoravid and Merinid ruins

things.name: Rai Music Bars
things.description: Oran is the home of Rai - North African pop fusion now popular worldwide
